consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Volvo Bus Corporation' from Sweden in the certificate is exactly found in the invoice header and contact section with allowed normalization (case, spacing, legal forms). No discrepancy in company name or country was found. The invoice explicitly mentions 'Volvo Bus Corporation' and matches the certificate consignor according to rules 4.1.0 and 4.1.3.6.

goods_description.certificate_value:
01 UNIT VOLVO BUS CHASSIS MODEL BERE ELECTRIC
WITH 01 ESS
VIN No: YV3U4W122TA226324
goods_description.invoice_value:
01 UNIT VOLVO BUS CHASSIS MODEL
BERE ELECTRIC with 01 ESS
goods_description.motivation: The goods description in the certificate matches the invoice exactly after normalization of case and spacing. VIN No. matches the invoice's VIN No. 'YV3U4W122TA226324'. There is no ambiguity or missing information. Rule 4.3.3 applied without discrepancies.

quantity.motivation: The certificate quantity 6100 kg matches the invoice total weight '6100' KG exactly. The invoice states 'Total weight:[KG]: 6100', which corresponds directly. Units and numeric values match exactly after normalization and allowed trunkation of decimal places (none in this case). The weight is verified as Gross Weight with corresponding certificate data per rule 4.4.4.

origin.motivation: The certificate indicates origin Sweden. Invoice states 'Country of origin: SE' which corresponds to Sweden after allowed normalization (ISO code and name). EU-normalization rules apply, and Sweden is an EU member. Rule 4.5.4.1 applied for origin verification with clear match.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points (consignor, consignee, goods description, quantity, and origin) match exactly with allowed normalization. No discrepancies detected.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt utan manuell handläggning.
